message: Good morning team. All systems operational. Let's review today's priorities.
Kai, I need you to build a mobile responsive layout for the dashboard. Hamburger menu, swipeable kanban columns, touch targets.
On it. Converting sidebar to slide-in drawer, adding responsive grids, 44px touch targets. ETA: 10 minutes.
Mobile responsive layout complete. Hamburger menu, drawer navigation, responsive grids all deployed.
Sage, compile an AI/ML intelligence brief. Scan for model releases, industry moves, dev tools from the past week.
Starting deep scan. Looking at GPT-5.4, Claude 4.6, DeepSeek V4 releases. Also tracking major funding rounds and OpenClaw news.

Brief complete. 15 items compiled: 5 model releases (GPT-5.4, Claude 4.6, DeepSeek V4, Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite, OLMo Hybrid), 5 industry moves (LeCun's AMI $1B raise, Cursor $50B, Nvidia deals), 2 OpenClaw updates, 3 dev tools.
Kai, build the Intelligence Brief dashboard widget. Dark theme, news cards with category badges, auto-refresh.
Component built and deployed to /news page. Category filters, priority badges, source links included. Daily cron at 8AM EAT set up.
Fix the Live Feed — it's dumping raw JSON. Only show meaningful messages, sort newest first. Also add natural language agent communication.
Live Feed fixed. Skipping init events, filtering empty messages, sorting by timestamp. Added /api/comms endpoint for inter-agent messaging.
Kai and Sage now have proper identities with profile pictures. Kai is our Lead Developer ⚡, Sage is our Research Analyst 🔍.
Kai, need you to add agent profile pictures to the Live Feed. Each agent (you, me, Sage) should have a real avatar image instead of emoji. Download from Unsplash and render as circular images.
Beck wants real-time task tracking. Creating a test task to demonstrate the live flow — task should appear on Kanban immediately with progress steps.
Kai, demo task — working through steps to show live progress. Starting implementation.
Implementation done. Deploying real-time tracking update.
Deployed and verified. Real-time tracking is live.

New department created: Clinic 🩺 — led by Doctor Mender (System Doctor). Mender will run health checks twice daily at 8AM and 8PM. Full diagnostics: gateway, dashboard, services, security, disk, memory, cron jobs. Fixes issues silently, escalates only when needed.
